# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

---
Resources:
  MyVpc:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties: 
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags: 
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVpcName
  
  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
  
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties: 
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties: 
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
  
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties: 
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
  
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties: 
      CidrBlock: '10.0.3.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
  
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties: <｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>
      CidrBlock: '10.0.4.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
  
  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties: 
      AllocationId: <AllocationId> # This is the Elastic IP allocation id which we'll get after creating it.
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  
Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref MyVpc
  InternetGatewayID:
    Description: "Internet Gateway ID"
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet1ID:
    Description: "Public Subnet 1 ID"
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2ID:
    Description: "Public Subnet 2 ID"
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
